title: Goal Contracts and Observable Completion · Control-Loop Lens: Goal Outcome
summary: Turn a vague long-running objective into an executable goal contract. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops goal outcome increment in a measurable goal and done-condition specification. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write a goal as an outcome rather than an unbounded activity.
State invariants that must hold before and after every loop iteration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Goal Outcome evidence

Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
